description_long: This object is a modern Samsung mobile phone with a striking red back panel and a rectangular form factor. The back features a prominent quad-camera module located in the top left corner, each lens encircled by a metallic ring and accompanied by a flash. The Samsung logo is clearly visible, centered horizontally near the bottom of the back panel in a contrasting white color. The phone's edges are smooth and slightly rounded, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. No physical buttons or ports are visible on the sides or back, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, enhancing the vividness of the red color.
description: A sleek red Samsung mobile phone with a quad-camera module on the back and a smooth, glossy finish. The Samsung logo is prominently displayed near the bottom.
description_view_0: The back of the phone is visible, showcasing the quad-camera module in the top left and the Samsung logo near the top edge.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the phone's slim profile and the camera bump on the left; the Samsung logo is visible on the back.
description_view_2: The back is shown from the opposite end, with the Samsung logo near the bottom and the camera module in the top right from this perspective.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, with the camera module on the right and the Samsung logo on the back.
attribute_brand_logo: White 'SAMSUNG' text logo centered horizontally near the bottom of the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is not visible in any view; no display content can be observed.
attribute_camera_placement: Quad-camera module located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a rectangular layout with four lenses and a flash.
